body_excerpt: In eicPresentationRetrieveEntryValue of acropora/app/identity/libeic/EicPresentation.c, there is a possible information disclosure due to a race condition. This could lead to local information disclosure with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
